lifecycleScripts.afterStart: wp-env run cli -- wp theme activate wp-soli-festival-theme && wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogname "Soli's Binge Festival" && wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogdescription 'Het festival van Muziekvereniging Soli' && wp-env run tests-cli -- wp theme activate wp-soli-festival-theme && wp-env run tests-cli -- wp option update blogname "Soli's Binge Festival" && wp-env run tests-cli -- wp option update blogdescription 'Het festival van Muziekvereniging Soli'
